title: Plan Change
content: As a subscriber, I want to change my current mobile plan so that I can get better benefits. The user must call POST /auth/login to authenticate, use GET /plans to view current and recommended plans, POST /plans/eligibility-check to validate eligibility, POST /plans/switch to select a new plan, then POST /payments/pay and POST /payments/activate to complete payment and activation. After successful activation, POST /notifications/send-confirmation is called to notify the subscriber.
